title: Selection of Bus Operator for 3,604 Electric Buses under PM-eBus Sewa (Tender 3)
eligibility_summary: Bus operators with experience in GCC-model electric bus operations. Qualification criteria specified in RFQ document.
key_risks: Multi-city coordination risk; depot allocation by STUs; grid availability for high-capacity charging.
why_it_matters: One of the largest active e-bus tenders in India. GCC model means operator funds buses + infra; risk on ops quality and utilisation. Significant revenue visibility for winning OEM.

title: Selection of Bus Operator for 2,900 Electric Buses under PM E-DRIVE Scheme (Tender II)
eligibility_summary: Bus operators with GCC experience. Delhi portion (3,330 buses) handled separately under same scheme.
key_risks: Bid deadline passed; award status unconfirmed. Large Delhi component adds political/regulatory complexity.
why_it_matters: PM E-DRIVE Tender II covers 2,900 buses plus 3,330 for Delhi (totalling 6,230). Award would be a major OEM order. Status needs monitoring.
notes: Bid deadline passed 15 April 2026. No verified extension or award data available. Marked Needs Review.

status_history.note: Bid deadline passed — no extension/award confirmed
